Anything that starts with a letter and consists of just letters and digits
can be used as an identifier (name of a variable, method, or class).

frontmatter.shortDescription: Every sequence of letters and digits starting with a letter can be used as an identifier
frontmatter.shortCorrection: Some character sequences are reserved for use as keywords and cannot be used as identifiers
